dataList.name: Curio
dataList.desc: When certain conditions are fulfilled, replace this effect with 'Art Medium'

dataList.name: Spark of Inspiration
dataList.desc: Deal +10% damage against targets with Art Medium

dataList.name: Art Medium
dataList.desc: If this unit has Bleed (in Focused Encounters, count Bleed on each Part separately), take +10% damage from Lust Skills

dataList.name: Exquisite Aesthetics
dataList.desc:
- Plus Coin Skills gain Coin Power +1
- Minus Coin Skills gain Base Power +(4 / # of Coins)
- Deal +30% damage with Skills

dataList.name: Firepower
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- Deal +10% damage for every Stack

dataList.name: Delicateness
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- Take +10% damage for every Stack

dataList.name: Shin (心) - ???
dataList.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +1
- Offense Level +2, Defense Level +2
- Gain +1 more Poise Potency and Poise Count from Skills
- Deal +(missing HP percentage + 25)% damage (max 100%)

dataList.name: Bridle
dataList.desc:
- All allies gain ((current Floor - 4) x 10)% max HP (max 60%)
- All allies gain Offense Level +(current Floor - 4) (max 5)

dataList.name: Glimpse of Precognition
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 5

- Clash Power +2 for every Stack
- For every 2 Stack:
  - Plus Coin Skills gain Coin Power +1
  - Minus Coin Skills gain Final Power +2
- Expires at Skill End

dataList.name: Ridiculous Grit
dataList.desc:
- Take -(50 + missing HP percentage)% damage from Skills (rounded down)

- On Clash Win, heal (Clash Count x 5) more SP (max 15)

- Turn End: If this unit lost SP this turn due to its Skill effects, gain 3 Damage Up next turn
dataList.flavor: "I don't need some stupid crutch like that "Shin (心)" crap. I just gotta pull as much power as I can from these tattoos and grit my teeth, and I'll overpower your fancy little tricks no problem."

dataList.name: Eye of Precognition
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 30
- Clash Power +2
- Turn Start: Gain 5 Stack
dataList.flavor: "The eye does not possess some supernatural power that shows its user the destined future. It is more akin to a computing device that analyzes everything it sees and provides the most likely scenario in the upcoming instant."

dataList.name: Eye of Precognition - Overheat
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 30
- Attack Skills deal -20% damage
- Convert all Coins on Skills that spend Acceleration Round to Unbreakable Coins
- Turn Start: Gain 10 Stack
- At 30 Stack, convert into "Eye of Precognition"

dataList.name: Game Target
dataList.desc: Fix this unit's Speed to 1; become the main target of the Attack Skill "Disposal" used by "The Thumb Nursefather - Valencina"
dataList.flavor: Prey marked by Famiglia Bognatelli will be hunted down without fail.

dataList.name: Viewing the Tableau
dataList.desc:
- Base Offense Level -20
- Base Defense Level -20
- Turn Start: Take -70% final damage if The Ring Apprentice has not retreated from this Encounter (rounded down; no min. value)
dataList.flavor: "The appreciation of artwork in a gallery calls for unhurried contemplation. Please remember—impatience dulls the appreciation of art."

dataList.name: Force Redistribution
dataList.desc: When an enemy is killed, it applies 3 Offense Level Up to all of its allies at the next Turn Start (3 times per turn; start of a new wave counts as Turn Start as well)

dataList.name: Psychological Elation
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: Heal 20 SP for all enemies
- (Minus Coin Skills-only enemies lose 15 SP instead)

dataList.name: Shield Generation
dataList.desc:
Apply 3000 Shield on all enemies
(In Focused Encounters, applies to Core only; Shield gained by this effect does not expire at Turn End)

dataList.name: Fracture Proliferation
dataList.desc: Enemy Skills inflict x2 Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking

dataList.name: Status Infliction
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Inflict 5 Potency of a random status, chosen from Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking, on all allies(Identities)

dataList.name: Beauty of the Physique
dataList.desc:
- Against enemies that have 20+ Bleed, Base Skills gain Coin Power +1 and deal +20% damage (calculated as the sum of Bleed on all targets for Skills that have 2+ Atk Weight)
- Base Skills that consume 'Unique Charge' gain Coin Power +1 (excluding E.G.O Skills)
- Turn End: This effect expires

dataList.name: Charm of the Beastly
dataList.desc:
- Against enemies that have 20+ Bleed, Base Skills gain Coin Power +1 and deal +20% damage (calculated as the sum of Bleed on all targets for Skills that have 2+ Atk Weight)
- On Attack Start, if target has 15- SP or 20+ Sinking Potency, gain 1 Blunt Power Up next turn (once per turn)
- Turn End: This effect expires

dataList.name: K Corp. Emergency Ampule
dataList.desc:
Activate the following effects upon taking damage that would reduce this unit's HP to 0:
- If Staggered, recover from Stagger
- Fully heal HP
- This effect activates before the "X does not reduce HP below 1" effects from Identities & E.G.O Passives
- Expires after activation

dataList.name: Splish Splash
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- In a Clash against Headless Ichthys, gain the following effects (once per Skill):
  · Gain and inflict Sinking equal to Stack
  · Heal SP equal to Stack
- At max Stack, Skills targeting Headless Ichthys deal +50% damage

dataList.name: Torn-out Butterfly
dataList.desc:
- Final Power +2 for all Skills
- When Staggered due to damage, immediately recover from Stagger and gain Shield equal to 100% HP (once per turn, excluding forced Staggers)
